ai.subtitle: Hi 😊 Main Amy hoon — parenting ke baare mein kuch bhi poochein, main yahaan hoon ❤️

landing.badge: AI se chalne wala Parenting Coach
landing.hero_headline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai
landing.hero_sub: Apne bachhe ke liye step-by-step, science-backed parenting plans paayein — aapki AI Parenting Coach se.
landing.hero_free: ✨ Shuru karna free · Koi credit card zaruri nahi
landing.problems_sub: Har parent inka saamna karte hain. Amy Coach aapko inhe solve karne mein madad karti hai — ek time pe ek personalized step.
landing.not_alone: Aap akele nahi hain — aur aapko khud isse samajhne ki zarurat nahi hai.
landing.features_heading: Smart Parenting ke liye Sab Kuch
landing.features_sub: Ek platform. Aapke bachhe ke liye design kiye gaye kayi powerful tools.
landing.coach_title: Amy Coach — Asli Parenting Challenges Solve Karein
landing.coach_desc: Nakhron se lekar screen time tak, neend se lekar dhyaan tak — Amy Coach aapko gehre, personalized step-by-step plans deti hai jo waqai kaam karte hain. Koi general advice nahi, sirf aapke bachhe ke liye science-backed solutions.
landing.highlight_1: Aapke bachhe ke liye personalized plans
landing.feature_routine_desc: Structured, personalized routines banayein jo aapke bachhe ko strong habits banane mein madad karein.
landing.feature_hub_desc: Ek hi jagah pe activities, insights, aur curated parenting guidance access karein.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Kuch bhi poochein aur jab bhi zarurat ho turant parenting advice paayein.
landing.mid_cta: Amy Coach se shuru karein aur jaise-jaise aap badhein, aur explore karein.
landing.how_sub: Aapke pehle personalized parenting plan ke liye teen simple steps.
landing.step1_desc: Woh parenting challenge chunein jise aap solve karna chahte hain — nakhron se lekar neend tak.
landing.step2_desc: Amy ko apne bachhe ki umar, personality, aur current habits ke baare mein batayein.
landing.step3_desc: Ek personalized, science-backed plan paayein jise aap aaj shuru kar sakte hain.
landing.trust_heading: Child Psychology aur Behavioral Science pe Banaya Gaya
landing.trust_sub: Har plan proven research pe based hai — general advice nahi. Framework pe trust karein, steps follow karein.
landing.trust1_desc: Bachhe lasting habits kaise banate hain iske proven principles pe based.
landing.trust2_desc: Top child psychologists se evidence-based strategies.
landing.trust3_desc: Duniya bhar ke experts dwara use kiye jaane wale practical parenting frameworks.
landing.final_cta_heading: Apni parenting journey shuru karne ke liye taiyaar hain?
landing.final_cta_sub: AmyNest AI ko join karein aur minutes mein ek personalized parenting plan paayein — bilkul free.
landing.whats_new_eyebrow: Parent Hub mein Abhi Add Kiya
landing.whats_new_heading: Parent Hub mein Kya Naya Hai
landing.whats_new_sub: Har umar ke liye chaar bilkul naye zones — infant care se lekar abacus tak, coloring fun se lekar printable worksheets tak.
landing.new_infant_desc: 12 mahine se chhote bachhon ke liye sleep, feeding, milestones aur daily care pe pediatrician-aligned guidance.
landing.new_abacus_desc: Step-by-step abacus lessons jo mental math aur concentration badhate hain — 5–12 saal ke bachhon ke liye perfect.
landing.new_funsheets_desc: Printable activity sheets — mazes, dot-to-dot, tracing aur logic puzzles jo aapka bachha aaj hi finish kar sakta hai.
landing.new_coloring_desc: Focus, fine motor skills aur creativity build karne ke liye curated coloring books — ghar pe print karein ya app mein color karein.
landing.footer_tagline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai

privacy.header_subtitle: Hum aapka data kaise handle karte hain
privacy.footer: © 2026 AmyNest AI. Sabhi adhikar surakshit hain.
privacy.md_intro: AmyNest ("the App") ko **AmyNest AI, Inc.** ("hum", "humein") operate karta hai. Yeh policy samjhati hai ki jab aap App use karte hain tab hum kaunsi jankari collect karte hain aur use kaise handle karte hain.
privacy.md_h2_1: 1. Hum kaunsi jankari collect karte hain
privacy.md_li_1_1: **Account ki jankari** jo aap sign up karte waqt dete hain: naam, email address, aur aapke sign-in provider se authentication identifiers.
privacy.md_li_1_2: **Child Profile ki jankari** jo aap apni marzi se enter karte hain (first name ya nickname, age, interests, routine preferences). Hum kabhi bhi kisi bachche ka last name, address, ya contact details nahi maangte.
privacy.md_li_1_3: **Routine aur task activity** jo aap App ke andar banate ya generate karte hain, jise aapka dashboard aur reward history dikhane ke liye use kiya jata hai.
privacy.md_li_1_4: **Technical data** jaise device type, OS version, app version, aur crash diagnostics, jise App ko stable rakhne ke liye use kiya jata hai.
privacy.md_h2_2: 2. Hum jankari ka kaise use karte hain
privacy.md_li_2_1: App ke core features dene ke liye (routines generate karna, tasks aur rewards track karna, aapke devices ke beech sync karna).
privacy.md_li_2_2: Aapke bheje hue support requests ka jawab dene ke liye.
privacy.md_li_2_3: App ki reliability aur performance sudharne ke liye.
privacy.md_p_2: Hum aapki personal information **nahi** bechte. Hum App ke andar bachchon ko third-party advertising **nahi** dikhate.
privacy.md_p_3: AmyNest ko parents aur guardians ke use ke liye design kiya gaya hai. App ke andar Child Profiles ko parent account manage karta hai. Hum sirf utni hi minimum jankari collect karte hain jitni bachche ka routine dikhane ke liye zaroori ho. Parents App se kabhi bhi child profile delete kar sakte hain.
privacy.md_p_4: Hum data un service providers ke saath share karte hain jo App chalane mein hamari madad karte hain (hosting, authentication, analytics, AI generation). In providers par contract ke through yeh pabandi hoti hai ki woh aapka data sirf hamari taraf se hi use karein. Kanoon ke tahat zaroorat padne par hum jankari disclose bhi kar sakte hain.
privacy.md_p_5: Aap App ke andar se, ya **support@amynest.ai** par email karke, kabhi bhi apna account aur usse judi saari jankari delete kar sakte hain. Backups 30 din ke andar hata diye jate hain.
privacy.md_h2_6: 6. Mobile app dwara use ki jane wali permissions
privacy.md_li_6_1: **Internet / Network state** — App load karne ke liye zaroori hai.
privacy.md_li_6_2: **Camera, Microphone, Photos** — sirf us waqt maanga jata hai jab aap koi aisa feature use karte hain jise inki zaroorat ho (jaise bachche ki profile picture upload karna). Hamesha optional.

tutorial.slide1_body: Stress-free mornings, smoother evenings, aur aisi routines jo sach mein tikti hain ke liye aapki AI co-parent.
tutorial.slide2_body: Amy ko apne bachche ke baare mein ek baar batayein. Woh har din sahi schedule banati hai — aur jab zindagi mein badlav aata hai, to use adjust bhi karti hai.
tutorial.slide3_body: Optional nudges aapki family ko bina pushy lage track par rakhte hain. Control aapke haath mein rehta hai.
tutorial.slide4_body: Step-by-step abacus lessons jo mental math aur concentration banate hain — 5–12 saal ke bachon ke liye perfect.
tutorial.slide5_body: Aapke baby ki neend, feeding, milestones aur daily care ke liye pediatrician-aligned guidance.
tutorial.slide6_body: Print karne wali activity sheets — mazes, dot-to-dot, tracing, aur logic puzzles jo aaj hi complete ho sakti hain.
tutorial.slide7_body: Creative coloring books jo focus, fine motor skills aur creative expression banati hain.

onboarding_chat.amy_intro: Hi {{name}}! Main Amy hoon, aapki parenting coach. Chaliye aapka profile set up karte hain — isme lagbhag 2 minutes lagenge!
onboarding_chat.amy_first_q: Chaliye shuru karte hain — aapke bachche ka naam kya hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_dob_q: Achha! {{name}} ki date of birth kab hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_school_start_q: School kis time shuru hota hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_school_end_q: Aur school kis time khatam hota hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_diet_notes_q: Koi religious ya cultural diet notes? (Jain, Halal, Kosher, Sattvik, etc.) Agar nahin to skip karein.
onboarding_chat.ph_diet_notes: jaise Jain, Halal, Kosher, no onion/garlic...
onboarding_chat.infant_dob_reply:
{{name}} abhi baby hai — kitna pyaara! 🍼

Is umr mein har bachcha alag hota hai — hum flexible routines ke hisaab se learning adjust karenge.

{{name}} ko abhi kaise feed kiya jaa raha hai? (optional, skip kar sakte hain)
onboarding_chat.amy_feeding_q: {{name}} ko abhi kaise feed kiya jaa raha hai? (optional, skip kar sakte hain)
onboarding_chat.feeding_reply: Samajh gayi! 😊 {{name}} ka sleep pattern kaisa hai?
onboarding_chat.skip_feeding: Skip — main baad mein add karunga/karungi
onboarding_chat.skip_sleep_reply: Koi baat nahin! {{name}} ka sleep pattern kaisa hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_more_q: Samajh gaya! Kya aap ek aur bachcha add karna chahte hain?
onboarding_chat.amy_next_child_q: Badhiya! Agle bachche ka naam kya hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_parent_name_q: Bas ho gaya! Aapka naam kya hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_role_q: Aapse milkar achha laga, {{name}}! Aapka role kya hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_work_q: Aur aapki work situation kya hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_region_q: Apne family ka food style choose karein 🌍
onboarding_chat.region_indian_drilldown: Aapka family kaunsa Indian cuisine pasand karta hai?
onboarding_chat.amy_mobile_q: 📱 Reminders ke liye aapka mobile number kya hai? (Aap ise skip kar sakte hain.)
onboarding_chat.skip_mobile: Skip — main ise baad mein add karunga/karungi
onboarding_chat.amy_allergies_q: 🌾 Kya meal plans mein avoid karne ke liye koi food allergies hain? (Agar nahin hain to skip karein.)
onboarding_chat.amy_saving: Aapka profile ab save ho raha hai...
onboarding_chat.amy_save_error: Aapka profile save karte waqt kuch galat ho gaya. Kripya dobara try karein.
onboarding_chat.saving_title: Amy aapka profile set up kar rahi hai...
onboarding_chat.error_sub: Hum aapka profile save nahin kar sake. Apna connection check karke dobara try karein.
onboarding_chat.notif_title: Reminders ke saath track par rahein
onboarding_chat.notif_subtitle: Amy aapko routines, bedtime aur meals ke baare mein remind kar sakti hai — har din sahi time par.
onboarding_chat.notif_benefit_routines: Routine reminders taaki kuch chhute na
onboarding_chat.notif_benefit_bedtime: Calm night routine ke liye bedtime alerts
onboarding_chat.notif_benefit_meals: Aapke bachche ke liye meal time nudges

nutrition.ebf_desc: WHO pehle 6 mahine tak sirf maa ka doodh recommend karta hai. Kisi aur khane ya paani ki zarurat nahi hai.
nutrition.ebf_hi: Vishv Swasthya Sangathan 6 mahine tak keval maa ke doodh ki salah deta hai.
nutrition.family_desc: Poore family ke liye ek meal banaiye aur umr ke hisaab se portions serve kijiye. Alag se cooking ki zarurat nahi!
nutrition.katori_note: * 1 katori ≈ 150ml cup. Bacche ki bhookh ke hisaab se adjust karein.
nutrition.score_tab_title: 🏆 Daily Nutrition Score · dainik poshan score
nutrition.score_tab_sub: {{label}} ke liye track karein · aaj kya khaya wo check karein
nutrition.tip_low: Apni nutrition badhaiye — dal, ek fruit, aur ek glass doodh add karein. · Dal, phal aur doodh zarur lein.
nutrition.tip_med: Palak ya methi jaisi hari sabziyan shamil karein. · Palak/methi zarur khayein.
nutrition.tip_high: Bas thoda aur! Packaged snack ki jagah roasted chana lein. · Bhune chane khayein.
nutrition.outstanding_sub: Consistency hi health ki key hai. Kal bhi aise hi jaari rakhein! · Har din yahi karein!
nutrition.section_nutrient_desc: {{label}} ke liye benefits, Indian food sources aur daily needs dekhne ke liye kisi nutrient par Tap karein.
nutrition.section_meal_plan: Weekly Meal Plan · saptahik bhojan yojana
nutrition.section_meal_desc: Hafte ke har din ke liye age-appropriate Indian meals.
nutrition.section_family_desc: Same meal — har family member ke liye alag portions. Ek baar cook karein, smart serve karein!
nutrition.source_footer: 📚 Source: ICMR-NIN Nutrient Requirements for Indians (2020) & WHO Guidelines

referrals.how_it_works_premium: Premium member ke roop mein, jab {{validThreshold}} friends aapke code se Sign up karte hain AUR unmein se kam se kam {{paidThreshold}} ek paid plan kharidta hai, tab aapko ek gift token milta hai (jo friend ke liye {{rewardDays}} days free premium ke barabar hai).

referrals.msg_premium_unlocked_other: 🎁 Aapke paas share karne ke liye {{count}} gift tokens hain!

referrals.msg_processing: Bas thoda sa aur — aapka reward process ho raha hai.

amy.title: Amy AI se Poochein
amy.lead: Koi bhi topic tap karein — Amy aapko warm, practical parenting advice turant degi.

sleep.label: Neend ki problem
sleep.prompt: Mere bachhe ko sone mein dikkat ho rahi hai. Mujhe kya karna chahiye?

tantrums.label: Bachhe ke nakhre
tantrums.prompt: Mera bachha baar-baar nakhre karta hai. Main isse kaise handle karoon?

picky_eating.label: Khaane mein nakhre
picky_eating.prompt: Mera bachha khaane mein bahut nakhre karta hai. Kaun si tarkeebein kaam aa sakti hain?

school_anxiety.label: School ka dar
school_anxiety.prompt: Mera bachha school jaane se ghabrata hai. Main uski kaise help karoon?

screen_time.label: Screen time
screen_time.prompt: Mere bachhe ki age ke liye kitna screen time sahi hai?

language.label: Bhasha aur bolchaal
language.prompt: Main apne bachhe ki bhasha aur bolne ki skill ko behtar karne mein kaise help karoon?

picky.label: Khaane mein nakhre
picky.prompt: Mera bachha picky eater hai. Kaun si tarkeebein kaam aa sakti hain?

school.label: School ka dar
school.prompt: Mere bachhe ko school jaane se ghabrahat hoti hai. Main kaise help karoon?

screen.label: Screen time
screen.prompt: Mere bachhe ki age ke liye kitna screen time sahi hai?

emotional.title: Emotional Support
emotional.desc: Parenting easy nahi hai. Amy yahan aapki sunne aur help karne ke liye hai — bina kisi judgment ke.

overwhelmed.title: Mere upar bahut kuch ho raha hai
overwhelmed.subtitle: Theek hai. Aap akele nahi hain.
overwhelmed.prompt: Ek parent ke roop mein mujhe lag raha hai sab kuch sambhalna bahut bhaari pad raha hai. Behtar feel karne ke liye main kya karoon?

child_anxious.title: Mera bachha pareshan sa lagta hai
child_anxious.subtitle: Hum milkar iska hal nikaalte hain.
child_anxious.prompt: Mera bachha aksar pareshan aur worried lagta hai. Main uski help kaise karoon?

struggling_connect.title: Hum theek se connect nahi ho pa rahe
struggling_connect.subtitle: Chote-chote kadam bhi bada farak la sakte hain.
struggling_connect.prompt: Mujhe lagta hai mere aur bachhe ke beech pehle jaisi baat nahi ho rahi. Hum stronger bond kaise banayein?

need_break.title: Mujhe thoda break chahiye
need_break.subtitle: Apna khayal rakhna bhi achhi parenting ka hissa hai.
need_break.prompt: Main ek parent hoon jise apne liye thoda time chahiye. Apni health aur mann ka khayal kaise rakhoon?

tips_fallbacks: Jab bachha kuch achha kare, usi waqt seedha bolein — “Tumne abhi ye achha kiya!”
Zid aur bahas se bachne ke liye do aasaan choices dein — dono aapko manzoor hon.
Routine pakka karne ke liye sone se pehle 10 min saath padhein.

locked.label: Aage badhne ke liye unlock karein

overwhelmed.title: Mere upar bahut kuch ho raha hai
overwhelmed.subtitle: Theek hai. Aap akele nahi hain.
overwhelmed.prompt: Ek parent ke roop mein mujhe lag raha hai sab kuch sambhalna bahut bhaari pad raha hai. Behtar feel karne ke liye main kya karoon?

anxious.title: Mera bachha pareshan sa lagta hai
anxious.subtitle: Chaliye milkar iska hal nikaalte hain.
anxious.prompt: Mera bachha aksar pareshan aur worried lagta hai. Main uski help kaise karoon?

connect.title: Hum theek se connect nahi ho pa rahe
connect.subtitle: Chote-chote kadam bhi bada farak la sakte hain.
connect.prompt: Mujhe lagta hai mere aur bachhe ke beech pehle jaisi baat nahi ho rahi. Hum stronger bond kaise banayein?

break.title: Mujhe thoda break chahiye
break.subtitle: Self-care achhi parenting ka hi hissa hai.
break.prompt: Main ek parent hoon jise apne liye thoda time chahiye. Apni wellbeing ka khayal kaise rakhoon?

emotional_footer.lead: Parenting mushkil hai. Amy yahan hai sunne aur help karne ke liye — bina kisi judgment ke.
emotional_footer.reassure_title: Aap jitna sochte hain, usse behtar kar rahe hain 💜
emotional_footer.reassure_body: Research dikhati hai ki aap information aur support dhoondh rahe hain — yahi baat aapko average se behtar parent banati hai. Aapki worry hi aapke pyaar ka proof hai.

empty.heading: Shuru karne ke liye bachcha add karein

errors.title: Test start nahi ho saka
errors.not_enough_content: Is game ke liye hum abhi aur questions add kar rahe hain. Filhal koi dusra game mode try kijiye.
errors.no_content_for_age_group: Is age group ke liye phonics content abhi taiyaar nahi hai. Thodi der baad dobara dekhiye.
errors.cooldown_active: Yeh test abhi available nahi hai. Cool-down khatam hone ke baad try kijiye.
errors.child_not_found: Hume yeh child profile nahi mili. Wapas jaakar dobara try kijiye.
errors.age_not_supported: Phonics tests 1–6 saal ke bachhon ke liye hain. Us range ka child select kijiye.
errors.session_misconfigured: Humari side se kuch misconfigured hai. Thodi der mein dobara try kijiye.
errors.unauthorized: Test start karne ke liye dobara sign in kijiye.
errors.invalid_body: Test start karne mein kuch gadbad hui. Dobara try kijiye.
errors.generic: Test start karne mein kuch gadbad hui. Dobara try kijiye.
